overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a foggy, neon-lit Night City plaza at night. The player ascends from a subway stairwell and explores a dystopian urban environment filled with holographic advertisements, street vendors, and industrial architecture.

events.description: ascending from underground subway stairs to open urban plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs from underground subway entrance toward street level

entered.detail: painted yellow metal handrails lining both sides of the concrete stairs
wide concrete stairs leading upward from the subway level
overhead fluorescent tube lighting illuminating the stairwell

segments.scene_description: Ascending a concrete stairwell from an underground subway entrance, with yellow painted railings on both sides and fluorescent overhead lighting. The camera moves steadily upward toward the street level exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with laundromat and seating areas

events.description: transitioning from fluorescent interior lighting to foggy neon-lit exterior environment

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza observing the neon signs and surroundings

entered.detail: illuminated storefront sign reading 'Wash' with neon lettering
tall buildings covered with large glowing holographic advertisements
modern concrete seating arranged around tree planters
palm trees in raised square concrete planters

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a wide open urban plaza at night, illuminated by neon signs including a prominent 'Wash' laundromat sign. The area features concrete benches, palm trees in planters, and towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements. A few pedestrians are seated on benches in the foggy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian street with vending machines and storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the pedestrian concourse past various storefronts and signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead wearing casual clothing and backpack

entered.detail: bright purple automated vending machine with glowing interface and product display
tall building with illuminated 'City Power' signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a pedestrian street lined with modern buildings, passing a bright purple vending machine on the right. The street is relatively empty with sparse pedestrians walking in the same direction, and the City Power building is visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley with large ventilation fans and barricades

events.description: turning left into narrower street with industrial buildings and exhaust fans
encountering a protester holding an umbrella and a sign reading 'IS NEAR'

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking through industrial area with large exhaust fans mounted on building walls

notable_agents.action: protester wearing mask and hat holding an umbrella and a sign that reads 'IS NEAR'

entered.detail: massive circular industrial ventilation fans mounted on building exterior walls
greenish aged apartment building with multiple balconies and worn facade
concrete and metal security barriers lining the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: Turning left into a narrower industrial alleyway with massive ventilation fans mounted on the building walls. The area has a more enclosed feel with concrete barricades and weathered apartment buildings. At around 38 seconds, a protester holding an umbrella and a sign reading 'IS NEAR' appears prominently in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food vendor market with multiple stalls

events.description: entering food vendor area with multiple illuminated stalls and bright lighting

agents.ego_description: walking past illuminated food vendor stalls and observing the market area

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind counter preparing food at illuminated stall

entered.detail: illuminated food stands with bright interior lighting and cooking equipment
glowing menu boards showing food items and prices in neon colors
red and black automated vending machine with digital interface

segments.scene_description: Entering a bustling food vendor market area with multiple illuminated stalls and bright neon menu displays. Vendors and customers are visible near the stalls, and the atmosphere is lively with various food stands lining the pedestrian walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a sterile underground transit hub into the neon-drenched chaos of a dystopian city plaza. It begins by climbing a concrete stairwell flanked by yellow railings under fluorescent lights, moving steadily upward until it emerges into a wide, foggy urban square illuminated by a prominent laundromat sign and towering holographic advertisements. As the camera moves forward, the open plaza shifts into a pedestrian street lined with modern architecture and a bright purple vending machine, passing the City Power building. The scene then turns left into a narrow, enclosed industrial alleyway characterized by massive ventilation fans and concrete barricades, where a protester holding an umbrella and a sign briefly enters the frame. Finally, the path opens up into a bustling food vendor market, transitioning from the weathered industrial corridor into a lively area filled with illuminated stalls and bright neon menu displays.
